# STRAT.017 ? OKRs (Objectives & Key Results)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** business_strategy
**Domain:** BUSINESS_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Ambitious objectives; measurable key results; transparency; frequent check-ins; stretch goals; bottom-up and top-down

## Application
Set ambitious objectives; define measurable results; make visible to all; review frequently; encourage stretch; align org-wide

## Key Values
- Ambitious goals
- Measurability
- Transparency
- Alignment
- Stretch thinking

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, business_strategy

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
